events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, having been born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: He's brought the beat to some of the most iconic songs ever recorded. Today, we're celebrating Ringo Starr's 86th birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! The Queen guitarist and astrophysicist continues to inspire. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his legendary guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your all-time favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's Launch
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the United States, revolutionising music consumption and broadcasting its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, a new channel hit the airwaves with a bold statement: 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. MTV changed everything. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of Oasis' iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which was originally released on August 29, 1994, launching the band into superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. That album defined a generation. What's your go-to track from their debut?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, running from August 15-18, and became a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance from the festival do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago. His music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: A true pioneer of the electric guitar, Jimi Hendrix left an indelible mark on music. We're paying tribute to his incredible talent today. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track?

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', which was originally released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your favourite track from the Fab Four's final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today, having been born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, she's still delivering powerful performances. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Star
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher is 54 today! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, his attitude and voice are unmistakable. What's your top track from the Manchester icon?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of John Lennon's seminal single 'Imagine', which was originally released in the US on October 11, 1971. The album followed shortly after.

angles.name: Imagine The Impact
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates as strongly today. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod release
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of Apple's revolutionary first-generation iPod, which was announced on October 23, 2001, and went on sale November 10, 2001.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the iPod changed how we listened to music forever? Today marks an anniversary of its groundbreaking release. How many songs did you cram onto your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, commemorating the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, 007 has been thrilling us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond and what's their best film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today, born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's the John Lennon song that resonates most with you?
